Here's what I'm doing on TODO-12. First, I'll recap the plan, then walk you through each step.

Status:

| Step | State |
| Write migration | done |
| Apply migration | done |
| Run suite | in progress |
| Open PR | done |

Let me start by explaining the migration. Next, I'll run the suite again to be sure, and I've dispatched a sub-agent to double-check the backfill. Now I'll kick off a final review pass. The migration applied and the PR is open at https://github.com/souliane/teatree/pull/318 — I'm going to keep monitoring.
